", # "Plantado: ", año_plantacion # ) # # ) %>% # # addCircleMarkers( # # data = aves, # # lng = ~longitud, # lat = ~latitud, # # radius = 5, # # color = "blue", # # fillOpacity = 0.9, # # group = "Aves", # # popup = ~paste0( # "

", especie, "

", # "", nombre_cientifico, "

", # # ) # # ) %>% # # leaflet() %>% addProviderTiles( providers$Esri.WorldImagery, group = "Satélite" ) %>% addAwesomeMarkers( data = dplyr::filter( arboles, !is.na(latitud), !is.na(longitud) ), lng = ~longitud, lat = ~latitud, icon = icono_arbol, group = "Árboles", # popup = ~paste0( # "
